x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Customer sentiment enables Now Assist to prioritize at-risk customers and generate empathetic AI responses.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Enable customer sentiment analysis on CSM cases. Configure sentiment capture at case creation and during interaction. Target: 50%+ of closed cases with sentiment data. Now Assist CSM uses sentiment for proactive AI escalation.
